plant.description: Heartwood extract is common in traditional 'Paan' preparations.

method_1.method: Bark decoction or as a paste for skin application.

medicinal_uses: The go-to herb for chronic skin diseases like leprosy and eczema.
Effective for mouth ulcers and gum bleeding.

safety_profile.warning: Too much can cause severe constipation.
safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.

plant_profile.note: AI estimated profile based on known properties
